data.title: PUBLIC HEALTH ADVOCACY INSTITUTE (PHAI) TO HOST THE UNITED STATES' FIRST-EVER INTERNATIONAL SYMPOSIUM FOCUSED ON BRINGING COMPREHENSIVE PUBLIC HEALTH REGULATION TO THE ONLINE GAMBLING INDUSTRY
data.description: On April 24, 2026, Boston will host leading international experts to address the increasing prevalence of online sports gambling, prediction markets, and online casino platforms. This event aims to provide solutions to tackle the widespread issue, which poses a threat to public health globally. The gathering will involve professionals from various countries and industries, emphasizing the urgent need for action. The meeting comes as an opportunity to strategize and collaborate on effective measures.

data.title: Medicus Healthcare Solutions Publishes New Report on the Cardiologist Shortage
data.description: In Windham, New Hampshire on April 9, 2026, it is reported that the demand for cardiovascular services is on the rise in the United States, creating pressure on healthcare organizations to ensure access to cardiology care. With workforce limitations being a concern, healthcare leaders are scrutinizing the situation closely. This trend signifies the growing need for cardiac services, with a surge in patients seeking care. This has put strain on healthcare providers to meet the demand, emphasizing the importance of addressing workforce shortages in the medical field.

data.title: LPL Financial Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call
data.description: In San Diego on April 09, 2026, LPL Financial Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: LPLA), the parent company of LPL Financial LLC, disclosed plans to release its first quarter financial outcomes on Thursday, April 30, post-market closure. A conference call to deliberate on the results is scheduled for 5 p.m. ET on the same day.

data.title: UDR, Inc. Named a Top Workplace by USA Today for Second Consecutive Year
data.description: In Denver, UDR, Inc. (NYSE: UDR), a prominent multifamily real estate investment trust, was named a 2026 Top Workplace by USA Today and Energage for workplace culture and engagement. With over 1,400 associates, UDR had previously been honored as a Top Workplaces winner in the Real Estate Industry for 2024 and 2025, and as a 2025 Top Workplace Colorado. This recognition highlights the company's commitment to fostering a positive work environment.

data.title: Emergent BioSolutions Partners with British Columbia to Supply NARCAN® Nasal Spray for the Launch of the Expanded BC Take Home Naloxone Program
data.description: In Winnipeg today, Emergent BioSolutions (NYSE: EBS) revealed its partnership with B.C. Provincial Health Services Authority (PHSA) to supply NARCAN ® Nasal Spray for the BC Take-Home Naloxone Program. The B.C. government has allocated an additional $18 million CAD to expand this program, which includes nasal naloxone. This extension builds upon B.C.'s nasal naloxone pilot initiative from 2024, where 60,000 nasal naloxone kits were distributed to various community sites, pharmacies, post-secondary institutions, First-Nations-mandated institutions, fire departments, municipalities, and libraries.

data.title: OpenAI and Anthropic to provide exclusive access to advanced cybersecurity products to select organizations for enhanced protection.
data.description: OpenAI and Anthropic have decided to limit access to their cutting-edge cybersecurity technologies, making them available exclusively to selected groups. This move ensures that only approved organizations can benefit from the significant advancements provided by these companies in the realm of cybersecurity.

data.title: CORRECTING and REPLACING PHOTO TÜV SÜD Earns Prestigious USA Today Top Workplaces Award
data.description: In Wakefield, Massachusetts, TÜV SÜD has received the prestigious USA Today Top Workplaces Award for the second consecutive year. The award, presented by HR technology company Energage, recognizes TÜV SÜD's dedication to cultivating a remarkable, employee-centric environment. This achievement underscores the company’s commitment to prioritizing its people.

data.title: TriNet to Acquire Cocoon, Expanding Leave Management Solutions for SMBs
data.description: TriNet (NYSE: TNET), a top provider of human resources solutions for small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs), announced an acquisition on April 9, 2026. The acquisition will bring a compliance-first leave product and AI-enhanced workflows to TriNet's clients and their employees. This move aims to enhance the company's offerings and strengthen its position in the market.

data.title: AZZ Inc. Announces Fiscal Year 2026 Fourth Quarter Cash Dividend
data.description: Fort Worth, TX - AZZ Inc., a top provider of hot-dip galvanizing and coil coating solutions, declared a cash dividend of $0.20 per share for the fourth quarter. This announcement came after the authorization by the company's Board of Directors. AZZ Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol AZZ.

data.title: Build-A-Bear's Promise Pets™ Collection Encourages Responsibility, Caretaking Through Play
data.description: A recent social media survey conducted by a popular brand has highlighted the significance of love, patience, and practical experience in getting ready for a real pet. The study, conducted ahead of National Pet Day on April 11, 2026, interviewed a range of participants to uncover key insights. Build-A-Bear Workshop, renowned for infusing life with heartfelt moments, spearheaded the research. The findings underscore the value of emotional connection, perseverance, and hands-on learning in preparing for the responsibility of owning a pet. The survey results offer essential guidance for individuals contemplating adding a furry companion to their lives.

data.title: Rizkalla Appointed to Plaintiff's Steering Committee in Lyft Passenger Sex Assault MDL
data.description: LOS ANGELES, April 9, 2026 - In a recent development, Ruth Rizkalla, a Partner at The Carlson Law Firm, has been selected to join the Plaintiff's Steering Committee for the Multi-District Litigation related to claims of sexual assault targeting Lyft passengers. This litigation is currently in progress, with a substantial number of cases being consolidated under it.

data.title: CarMax Announces William Cobb and Jim Kessler to Join the Board
data.description: CarMax, Inc. revealed its plan to expand its Board of Directors by appointing William "Bill" Cobb and Jim Kessler as new directors for the upcoming 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders. The move aims to enhance the Board with their expertise in the auto industry and consumer sector. CarMax, the country's largest seller of pre-owned vehicles, sees this addition as valuable. Tom Folliard, the Interim Executive Chair of the Board, highlighted the importance of their experience. The company is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol KMX.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- SkillsRight/
data.description: OneTen has transformed into SkillsRight to assist businesses in thriving in a skills-focused economy. The announcement was made on 09-Apr-2026 by SkillsRight through PR Newswire. The company has indicated that revisions have been incorporated into the release. For the full and accurate details, read on below: OneTen...

data.title: Federated Hermes, Inc. completes acquisition of 80% majority interest in FCP Fund Manager, L.P.
data.description: Privately-owned FCP® is a key player in multifamily real estate investments, managing client assets totaling $3.5 billion as of December 31, 2025. This move further expands Federated Hermes' real estate presence in major US markets, in addition to its well-established UK platform. The partnership reinforces Federated Hermes' dedication to enhancing its impact in the real estate sector.

data.title: Enact to Host First Quarter 2026 Earnings Call May 6th
data.description: Enact Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: ACT) of Raleigh, North Carolina, revealed plans to release its first quarter financial report on May 5, 2026, after the market closes. The company will conduct a conference call on May 6, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss the financial results for the first quarter of 2026.

data.title: White House and crypto sector clash with bank lobby over stablecoin profits, amidst increased scrutiny.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the economy grew by a staggering 6.5% in the last quarter, beating all expectations. This growth was primarily driven by a surge in consumer spending, which increased by 4.2%. Additionally, the labor market also saw significant improvements, with unemployment falling to 4.9%, the lowest it has been in years. However, concerns have been raised about rising inflation, which reached 3.2% in the same period. Despite these challenges, experts remain optimistic about the overall trajectory of the economy in the coming months.
